prevalence.value: common; seasonal allergic and viral outbreaks

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis with red flag triage for keratitis/uveitis and vision impairment

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with symptomatic care; stewardship reduces unnecessary antibiotics

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care and optometry pathways commonly manage; ophthalmology referral for red flags
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Supportive and antihistamine drops; antibiotics only when bacterial suspected; infection control guidance
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Managing outbreaks and reducing unnecessary antibiotic drops
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong primary care and eye care access in many member states
